title: LiveCaptionRoom
description: Firestore document schema for `live_captions/{roomId}`. The room id equals the venue id (`venues/{venueId}`). Written exclusively by the captions server via the Admin SDK; clients only read.

enabled.description: Manual kill switch. Operators set this to false to hide captions.

isLive.description: True while a broadcaster connection is ingesting audio.

sourceLang.description: BCP-47 tag of the language being transcribed (e.g. ja-JP).

interim.description: Latest in-progress transcript, overwritten in place (≤1Hz).
